description: Managing complete branch operations for a financial institution, overseeing loan processing, team leadership, market analysis, and ensuring regulatory compliance while building strong community relationships.

Delivered comprehensive soft skills training across government colleges, government schools, and multiple CSR projects. Led transformative programs including Mahindra Pride Classroom, Skill Bridge Program, and Digital Equalizers for Girls.
Served as a TOT Certified Trainer conducting government training projects, facilitating workshops, performing assessments, developing training materials, and mentoring fellow trainers.
Managed travel planning, customer service, supplier negotiations, and booking operations, developing strong communication and client management skills.
